title: Cocoons
description: Manage nested cocoon structure here. Conversation, memory, and runtime details live in a dedicated workspace page.
loadReferenceFailed: Failed to load characters or model data
treeDescription: Parent-child relationships define inheritance paths. This page is for structure only, not chat.
treeEmpty: There are no cocoons yet. Start by creating a root cocoon.
selectedDescription: Inspect the real cocoon configuration returned by the backend before entering the workspace.
roleInheritanceHint: Child cocoons inherit role settings from the parent chain unless explicitly overridden.
workspaceHint: This page does not render chat. Use the button above to enter the dedicated workspace.
actualConfigHint: This page now only shows cocoon settings that the backend really persists and returns.
emptySelection: Select a cocoon on the left to see structure details and available actions.
usageLine1: Stay on this page if you are organizing structure. Enter the dedicated workspace if you want to chat, inspect memories, or manage the latest round.
usageLine2: Keeping “inherit from parent” when creating a child cocoon is the easiest way to branch a story from the current node.
dialogCreateChildDescription: A child cocoon can inherit the parent cocoon's character and model. If you keep “inherit from parent”, the backend will reuse parent settings automatically.
dialogDefaultDescription: Fill in the base cocoon information and the runtime settings that are actually supported by the backend.
compactMemoryHelp: This is the upper bound for compacted memories written during compaction, not a fixed required count.
confirmDeleteDescription: Deleting it will also clear related messages, memories, and audit records.
